name: Hopf Fibration Fiber Bundle
description: Hopf fibration visualization from S³ to S². Each screen pixel maps to a point on S² whose fiber is a circle in S³, projected via stereographic projection to 2D. Linked circles colored by base-space coordinate with HDR bloom at crossings.

params.name: 4D Rotation
params.description: Controls the overall strength of the generated effect.

params.name: Fiber Thickness
params.description: Controls animation and temporal evolution speed.

params.name: Crossing Bloom
params.description: Controls spatial scale, frequency, or detail contrast.

params.name: Particle Drift
params.description: Controls mouse-driven or secondary variation influence.
